item.title: Sanofi Q1 Earnings and Dupixent
item.description:
• Summary: Sanofi reported first-quarter 2026 earnings that highlighted the strong performance of Dupixent (dupilumab) and the company's expectation to extend the drug's exclusivity beyond 2031 through patent protections and life-cycle management. The earnings also covered the immunology pipeline and vaccines business. Sanofi executives defended Dupixent's patents amid potential challenges, while acknowledging operational successes independent of the recent CEO change. The blockbuster drug remains a cornerstone of Sanofi's immunology franchise.
  • MoAs: IL-4Rα antagonist: Blocks the interleukin-4 receptor alpha subunit, inhibiting IL-4 and IL-13 signaling, key drivers of type 2 inflammation in conditions like atopic dermatitis, asthma, and nasal polyps.
  • Sources: FiercePharma, BioPharma Dive, BioSpace
